title: Requirements refinement: model-switching
description: Hone requirements through Q&A for the model-switching feature

title: Answer Q3 for model-switching
description: Answer the Inquisitor's Q3 about whether RecentModels persistence should be in scope

title: Close requirements-answering and finalize design
description: Write or confirm design.md for model-switching, close requirements-answering task, emit design.drafted

title: Design review: model-switching
description: Adversarial review of design.md against requirements.md and codebase

title: Research: model-switching codebase exploration
description: Explorer phase: map existing patterns, integration points, constraints for model-switching implementation

title: Write model-switching implementation plan
description: Create plan.md for TDD implementation of model switching feature

title: Write code task files for model-switching
description: Convert the 9-step model-switching plan into code task files and materialize Step 1 runtime task

title: Step 1: Update config default model string
description: TDD: update test assertion then change ProviderConfig::default() model to 'us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6-v1:0'. File: ap/src/config.rs. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/model-switching/tasks/task-01-update-config-default-model.code-task.md

title: Add model: &'a str to Provider trait
description: Update Provider::stream_completion() signature to add model: &'a str as first param. Intentionally breaks build — implementors fixed in Step 3. See task-02-add-model-param-to-provider-trait.code-task.md

title: Step 3: Update BedrockProvider and context.rs
description: Update BedrockProvider::stream_completion and context.rs to fix all Provider trait implementors broken in Step 2. Restores build green (except turn.rs + tui/mod.rs which are Step 4/5).

title: Update turn.rs to Propagate Model from Conversation
description: Update turn_loop() to extract conv.model.clone() and pass as first arg to stream_completion(). Update MockProvider and ErrorProvider test stubs in turn.rs. Add CapturingMockProvider with Arc<Mutex<String>> to verify model propagation. See task-04-update-turn-model-propagation.code-task.md

title: Add ChatEntry::System variant + StubProvider updates
description: Add System(String) variant to ChatEntry enum in tui/mod.rs. Update both StubProvider stream_completion signatures with _model: &'a str. Build will intentionally fail on ui.rs exhaustive match (expected — fixed in Step 6). Ref: task-05-add-chatentry-system-variant.code-task.md

title: Render ChatEntry::System in tui/ui.rs + 3 tests
description: Add ChatEntry::System match arm to chat_entries_to_lines() in ui.rs. Fixes the non-exhaustive match from Step 5. Renders with theme.muted color and diamond prefix. Write 3 unit tests. Code task: task-06-render-chatentry-system.code-task.md

title: Add /model slash command handler in handle_submit
description: Add /model <name> slash command interception to TuiApp::handle_submit() in ap/src/tui/mod.rs. Updates model_name and conv.model, pushes ChatEntry::System confirmation, returns early. Includes 6 tokio tests. Spec: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/model-switching/tasks/task-07-add-model-slash-command.code-task.md

title: Add --model CLI flag to Args in main.rs
description: Add --model optional CLI flag to Args struct. Overrides config.provider.model before run_headless or run_tui. 2 new unit tests for flag parsing.

title: Full audit and verification (model-switching Step 9)
description: Final quality gate: cargo build, clippy, test (≥232), verify mock providers, BedrockProvider param usage, --help output, and conv.messages unaffected by /model command. See task-09-audit-and-verify.code-task.md

title: Validate model-switching implementation
description: Full validation gate for the model-switching feature: build, tests, lint, E2E, code quality

title: Commit: model-switching feature
description: Create git commit for model-switching implementation after validation.passed
